TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Rukai, story: RukaiNr-marriage ceremony_taugadha

S.FORM: sabaw makanaelre.
S.TRANSL: 大家好。
Greetings, everyone

S.FORM: kay lucekecekeleane yaie makucingalre tara tuamadu kayki marudrange.
S.TRANSL: 要建立家庭，聽從老人是很重要的。
It is important to obey the elders for having a family.

S.FORM: kay lulrikarudrange kay Ngudradrekay.
S.TRANSL: 如果魯凱族人想結婚。
Rukai people would like to get married.

S.FORM: maupapalangeane madu si la maceacebe madu si kuauaubu mapakapakane lu makakelakela nga ku kidremedreme madu.
S.TRANSL: 如果(雙方)要完成儀式，(他們)就要互相送禮然後他們聚餐。他們的心要貼近。
If (two families need a ceremony, (they) should give gifts and (they) dine together; (their) heart will be close

S.FORM: mapelaela ki kuini.
S.TRANSL: (老人)互相討論這個。
(elders) discussed this.

S.FORM: maracacacangeta si sana lrikakakadrua kudra kerece yaie sana madaudaruru yaie.
S.TRANSL: 然後，若(婚禮)草率(決定)，(雙方)靈魂將會沒有連結。
Then, if (a marriage) is (arranged) in a hurry, then the spirit of (the two families) will have no connection.

S.FORM: kikay rarukudrane yaie sabadhane lamakaela ku talialalay si lakaukaulu lakaukaulu si tagiagi.
S.TRANSL: 貴族、平民、非長子的聘禮不同。
The dowry is different for nobles, civilians, and non-eldest sons.

S.FORM: la kamani kay rarukudrane laububulu yakay ku talialalayane yakay ku tagiagiane yakay ku lakaukauluane.
S.TRANSL: 所以聘禮必需品有貴族用，非長子用，及平民用。
So for necessity, the dowry, there are nobles’, non-eldest sons’, and civilians’.

S.FORM: kikay rarukudrane amani kuini sarakayane madu kuini lu lu karudrangane.
S.TRANSL: 這聘禮就是用於結婚。
The dowry will be used for the wedding.

S.FORM: kudra asasane nga kudra rarukudrane yaie la kamani kay yaie angatu.
S.TRANSL: 現在的聘禮就是木材。
The recent dowry is wood.

S.FORM: tarapasuala madu ka talisauvalayane kiaangatu.
S.TRANSL: 男生要先砍樹。
The male must at first lumber the wood.

S.FORM: e la tara ikay kudra sakanekane.
S.TRANSL: 要有吃的東西。
There must be food.

S.FORM: kikay sakanekane la kamani kay budulu.
S.TRANSL: 吃的東西有豬肉。
The food contains pork.

S.FORM: budulu lu iyaane amani kay vagisi amani kay cai.
S.TRANSL: 豬肉必須是腿肉或五花肉。
The pork must be rump and sirloin.

S.FORM: la ikay ku abay.
S.TRANSL: 要有米糕。
There must be rice cake.

S.FORM: la ikay kikay bava.
S.TRANSL: 要有小米酒。
There must be millet liquor.

S.FORM: amani kuini makuciacingale.
S.TRANSL: 這些很重要。
These are very important.

S.FORM: lapatupapalraw madu ku sabiki ku bava ku akanekane ku drumane.
S.TRANSL: 還會有檳榔、小米酒等其他吃的東西。
The following needs the betel nut, millet liquor, and other food.

S.FORM: amani kuini sia rarukudrane.
S.TRANSL: 這些就叫聘禮。
These are called dowry.

S.FORM: tarapasuala madu ku rarukudrane pulebe.
S.TRANSL: 聘禮一定要先拿下來。
The dowry must be put down first.

S.FORM: lue maku pulebeane kuini mabelana rarukudrane.
S.TRANSL: 聘禮要是新的如果(它)被放下。
Dowry must be new if (it) is put down.

S.FORM: ku rarukudrane lri tara ikay ku angatu.
S.TRANSL: 聘禮，一定會要有木頭。
The dowry, there will must be wood.

S.FORM: la ikay ku e butulu butulu luiyaane amani kay vagisi amani kay cau amani kay lre.
S.TRANSL: 也要有豬肉，他們就是腿肉、五花肉、(和) 頸肉。
There is also pork; they are exactly rump, sirloin, (and) neck.

S.FORM: la lri ikay ku abay la lri ikay ku bava la lri ikay ku sabiki ikay ku sapuane.
S.TRANSL: 然後要有米糕；有小米酒；有檳榔；有石灰。
Then there are rice cake; then there are millet; then there are liquor; then there are betel nut; (and) there are lime.

S.FORM: lay lu makadulru su pasudaudaudalruane ikay lu pulebe nga kuini kikay yaie ala pulebe kuini laububulu.
S.TRANSL: 你要能盡所有款待之物，然後放下這些...這些必需品。
You will be capable of all the treatment; then put down this…put down these necessities.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: lu ka lautiatiane jiushi pinli.
S.TRANSL: 這就是台灣人所謂的「聘禮」。
This is the “dowry” in Taiwanese.

S.FORM: pasuala nga madu pulebe kuini laububulu yaie la ka lrabu lrabu si palungu.
S.TRANSL: 首先，若要放下聘禮，(要有)山刀跟鐵鍋。
First, if (you) want to put down the necessity, and (there must be) machete and iron pot .

S.FORM: guozi gen dao.
S.TRANSL: 鍋子跟刀。
machete and iron pot.

S.FORM: pasualala nga kuini la ka talialalay la kamani kavay kadilrungane lu ka talialalay arakay madu kay taidusaane kay nivalrivalringuvane si tinu singisingane suatavaneane kuini.
S.TRANSL: 首先，貴族有陶壺，貴族要有兩個東西，singisingane 跟 nivalrivalringuvane。
First, Clay pots for nobles, Noble must have the clay pot which contains two things: singisingane and nivalrivalringuvane.

S.FORM: la ka lakaukaulu lu pudrilrungu su la kay amani kay belenge kikay.
S.TRANSL: 如果你是平民，你就會有上面的這個。
If you are a civilian, (you have) this in the upper part.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: zhe shi guizu taohu zhe shi pingmin taohu.
S.TRANSL: 這是貴族陶壺這是平民陶壺。
This is noble’s clay pot; this is civilian clay pot.

S.FORM: tara yakay kuini la ikay ka silu.
S.TRANSL: 一定要有這個；一定要有項鍊。
There must be this; there must be a necklace.

S.FORM: kay silu lu baiane ki talialalay amani kay kikay saki rerethane.
S.TRANSL: 給貴族的項鍊用rerethane做成。
The necklace which given to the nobles is made of rerethane.

S.FORM: hon kikay lakaukaulu wabai madu pakavaeva kay la mia kay.
S.TRANSL: 平民要給這個。
Civilians need to give one of this.

S.FORM: kikay lakaukaulu un ala iya si kikay ki kuini ala ikay nga kikay talaedre.
S.TRANSL: 這平民呢，這個…這裡有平民用的肩帶。
The civilians, this…There are shoulder belts for the civilians.

S.FORM: la ka arakay madu kay talaedre.
S.TRANSL: (平民)用這肩帶。
(Civilians) use this shoulder belt.

S.FORM: la arakay madu kay pagamucu.
S.TRANSL: (平民)用這頭飾。
(Civilians) use this head bend.

S.FORM: hon en la kikay yakay kudra makucingalre kudra sapasimayane amani kikay laimay kuini sapasimayane yaie kadrua nga ku laimay ku abaaiane numiane ngiamamulainay aku si baai numiane.
S.TRANSL: 這結婚禮服不是要送你們的，是我脫下(它)給你們的。
This wedding dress is not to give you; I put it off and give (it) to you.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱複數.自由斜格
第一人稱單數.附著主格
第二人稱複數.自由斜格

S.FORM: la kaidu mualralra kuini en sasimayane.
S.TRANSL: 然後(我)脫下這件結婚禮服。
Then (I) put off this wedding dress.

S.FORM: yakay lu paelreane ku kadaengane lu ka maesaesaesya su yaie paelre madu ku kadaengane.
S.TRANSL: 如果你很富有，(聘禮)也可以一併有土地。
There is also land (in the dowry), if you were rich; you (put) land together.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: kay talialalay yaie maelane kudra nyake lini puku lini.
S.TRANSL: 這貴族，他們的靈魂與他們的力量不同。
The nobles, their spirit and their power are different.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格
第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: yakay kudra en babai ini kuini drakerale hechuan taalupuane.
S.TRANSL: 有給河川跟獵場的。
There are giving (including) this rivers and hunting fields.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: yakay kuini talialalay.
S.TRANSL: 有這種貴族。
There are this kind of nobles.

S.FORM: la kamani kudra thingale madu yaie.
S.TRANSL: 那是要知道的。
That is needed to be known.

S.FORM: yiding shi zheyang de hon dangtian xinlang bu shi xinniang zuigao de toushi.
S.TRANSL: 一定是這樣當天新郎，不是新娘最高的頭飾。
it must be that the highest head band of the bribe, not the groom in that day.

S.FORM: ki kuini lu ka ababay yaie ki kuini marudrarudrange tara wabai madu la pua civare madu.
S.TRANSL: 結婚的女生要給並放(東西)在頭飾裡。
The woman in the wedding need to give and put (things) in the head bend.

S.FORM: la pua madu kavay adrisi.
S.TRANSL: (她)放羽毛。
(She) put the fur.

S.FORM: kikay adrisi pasia civare madu ku adrisi ki ababay.
S.TRANSL: 女生要放羽毛在頭飾裡
The female need to put the fur in the head bend.

S.FORM: wabai madu si la pasi bengelray madu kay adrisi kudra kakudhane yaie kikay ababay kaykay.
S.TRANSL: 傳統上，女生要給並插羽毛在頭飾上。
Traditionally, the woman must give and put the fur in the head bend.

S.FORM: ta shi matemele jiu shengjiede nuren.
S.TRANSL: 她是一個處女就一個聖潔的女人。
She is a virgin, a pure woman.

S.FORM: chunjie de nuren de xiangzheng yiding shi baihehua zuo de.
S.TRANSL: 純潔的女人的象徵一定是百合花做的。
The symbol of a virgin must be made by lily.

S.FORM: ranhou xiongying yumao yiba hao la kudra lu ikay ku talialalay la pia madu saceacebe.
S.TRANSL: 然後雄鷹羽毛一把給貴族或老人。
Then a grasp of male eagle fur is for the noble or elders.

S.FORM: shi gei buluo toumu de li huoshi bijiao lao de laorenjia yeyao zuo zhege hon.
S.TRANSL: (然後雄鷹羽毛一把)給貴族或老人。
(Then a grasp of male eagle fur) is for the noble or elders.

S.FORM: kikay Ngudradrekay yaie lu ka mabula paiya madu kiki kuini.
S.TRANSL: 如果是純潔的魯凱族人，(他/她)能做這個。
If the Rukai person is pure, (s/he) will do this.

S.FORM: shengjie de nuren gongkai jiaowang de nannu cai you shensheng de hunli.
S.TRANSL: 只有處女跟公開交往的男女能有聖潔的婚禮。
Only virgin and those engaged in public can have holy wedding ceremony.

S.FORM: ala yasi kiakaurirarira kuini kiakauriariva lu iyaane kai kiavaga ki latina ini kai kiavaga ki latama ini.
S.TRANSL: (你)被人私下談論或父母親不答應。
(You) are being privately criticized or not agree by parents

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格
第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: xunqing ah siben ah meiyou zheyang de yige hunli.
S.TRANSL: 殉情或是私奔(的人)沒有這樣的一個婚禮。
(Those) who commit suicide for frustrated love or elope will have no such a wedding ceremony.

S.FORM: la ka kadrua ku sabadhane la ka kadrua ku rarukudrane ngimiya kikikuini.
S.TRANSL: 這樣就會沒有聘禮或沒有其他東西。
it will be like this: there will be no dowry and there will be no other items.

S.FORM: ala mapalralraingi nga kiki kuini la e dralray madu.
S.TRANSL: 若(他們)互相同意這個後，(他們)就要跳舞。
When (they) mutually accept this, (they) should dance.

S.FORM: jiushi zuida yaodao qinghe de na yitian buluo dadaxiaoxiao de ren nannulaoshao dou yao chuanzhuo chuantong de fushi lay karudrange si kipaelre dralray kikikuini.
S.TRANSL: 就是到了慶典那天，部落裡的男女老幼都要穿傳統服飾參加典禮並跳舞。
It is that when the ceremony takes place, everyone in the tribe should wear traditional costume; (they) join the wedding and dance.

S.FORM: (19)lu makadralray (08)ala utavanane madu si lay sateatedre madu kuini ki ababay.
S.TRANSL: (他們)跳舞，要護送女生並回家。
(They) dance, (and) they (need) to escort the female and return.

S.FORM: kay Ngudradrekay yaie makucingalre kuini wasateatedre.
S.TRANSL: 對魯凱人來說，護送是很重要的。
To Rukai people, the escorting is very important.

S.FORM: Rukaizu jiehun congqian you yige jiaozuo qianghun qianghun aikatuanga.
S.TRANSL: 魯凱族從前有一個叫做搶婚的習俗。
There is an old Rukai custom called “grab marriage.”

S.FORM: kikay Un Ngudradrekay yaie tuakucingalre kikay demelane kay ki ababay.
S.TRANSL: 魯凱族人很重視女人的貞潔。
Rukai people stress on the chastity of woman.

S.FORM: Rukai de ren feichang zhongshi nuren de zhencao shouzhen de wenhua.
S.TRANSL: 魯凱族人很重視女人的貞潔和守貞的文化。
Rukai people stress on the chastity of woman and celibate.

S.FORM: lu katuase nay yaie lu ki malra kuini.
S.TRANSL: 當我們離開時，(我們)要帶女生走。
When we leave, (we) should carry the female.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數(排除).附著主格.主格

S.FORM: lay ki pasilaimay Ah nuren yao kaishi Ah dao nanfang de jia quanshen yao ba zhege bijiao zhongyao de buwei tebie baohu gei ta chuanzhe.
S.TRANSL: 裹身布用在女生被送到男方家裡時，穿著它把重點部位保護住。
Wrap cloth is used when the female is sent to the male’s house; it is worn to protect the private part of body.

S.FORM: kuini kyapasimay amiya.
S.TRANSL: 這就是裹身。
This is cloth-wrapping.

S.FORM: ala lu kela kuini ki sauvalay lu yaie.
S.TRANSL: 如果來(到)男方這邊。
If (she) come to the male’s place

S.FORM: women jiang de qianghun hon bushi xiang women xianzai de Un jianghao le nage Nannu jiu keyi jindao fangzi limian shui shuijiao.
S.TRANSL: 搶婚不是像現在人所說的男女談好了就能進房睡覺。
The grab marriage is not what people are talking about now: man and woman mutually accept, and enter the house to get laid.

S.FORM: hun haiyou nage nude hon yinwei ta you chuan baohu nage sandian de hon suoyi hon yaoba yi nan yi nu songdao nage hon fangjian limian hon zhege nanhaizi weile yao de zhege nuren de zhencao yiding yao yong kongshou qu ba zhexie dongxi jiekai Ah jiekai ah.
S.TRANSL: 因為女生身上穿有保護三點的裹身布，所以將一男一女送入房間後，男生一定要用空手把這些東西解開。
Because the woman is wearing the wrap cloth for private-part protection, when the coupe is sent into the room, the man must unwrap those things with bare hands.

S.FORM: youde ren yinwei zhege pakialringaw silaimay makucingalre si la e yakay lu makatulrulu lu makasupatele lu mualra patelre kuini lay tadrusa apece.
S.TRANSL: 因為裹身很緊密，有時會要到三四天小倆口才能同寢。
Because the wrapping is too solid, sometimes it takes three to four days for the couple to get laid.

S.FORM: lay tadrusa apece.
S.TRANSL: 兩人同寢。
The couples sleep.

S.FORM: paiya kuini kudra takarudrarudrangeane ki e Ngudradrekay tualrepenge aku.
S.TRANSL: 這就是魯凱的結婚典禮，我說到這裡。
This is the wedding ceremony of Rukai; I stopped saying here.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著主格
